name: Chocolate Pudding (Using Pudding Mix)
recipeInstructions:
2 servings of about 1/2 cup each, 60 calories per serving
1. Stir the mix, cocoa, and sugar together in a saucepan. Add water and mix well.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture just begins to boil—about 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in margarine and vanilla.
4. Pour pudding into a bowl. Place wax paper directly on the surface of the pudding.
